home.title: Experiment Controller
home.subtitle: Stress Detection Study
home.description: Interactive experiment orchestrator for early stress detection research using Samsung Galaxy Watch (PPG) + Polar H10 (ECG).

deviceCheck.title: Device Check
deviceCheck.subtitle: Ensure all devices are connected and ready before starting the experiment.

relaxation.title: Relaxation Phase
relaxation.subtitle: Follow the breathing circle. Inhale… hold… exhale… hold…

routine.title: Researcher Notes
routine.subtitle: Record any observations before the stress phase begins. Click Continue when ready.

stress.title: Mental Arithmetic
stress.subtitle: Solve the problems as quickly and accurately as possible.

complete.title: Session Complete
complete.subtitle: Thank you for participating in this study.

skip.title: Skip Phase?
skip.message: Are you sure you want to skip the {phase} phase? This action will be logged.

export.title: Data Export
export.subtitle: Enter the admin key to access CSV exports.
export.invalidKey: Invalid admin key. Please try again.
export.serverError: Cannot reach the backend. Is the server running?
export.dashboardSubtitle: Export participant phase timestamps as CSV.
export.noData: No participant data found. Complete a session to see data here.
export.csvNote: CSV: participant_code, phase (Relax / Routine / Task), start_timestamp, end_timestamp (ISO 8601 WIB), date (dd/MM/yyyy).
export.dataNote: All data is pseudonymous — no PII is exported.
export.noPhaseData: No phase data for this participant.
